name: nphies-claims
description: Automate MOH-ABHA and Al Rajhi (Riyadh) claims submission management for NPHIES with agents, skills, hooks, and MCP server integration.

skills.title: Claim Triage
skills.description: Analyze rejection codes and categorize claims by priority and corrective action

skills.title: Document Validation
skills.description: Verify supporting documents for completeness and format compliance

skills.title: Approval Limits Check
skills.description: Check and validate patient/provider approval limits from Oasis

skills.title: Batch Processor
skills.description: Execute controlled batch submissions with progress tracking and validation

agents.title: Submissions Manager
agents.description: Orchestrate claims submission workflow with safety guardrails

agents.title: Appeals Processor
agents.description: Process rejection appeals and prepare corrective documentation

commands.title: NPHIES: Batch from CSV
commands.description: Run batch from CSV file (default: dry-run)

commands.title: NPHIES: Show Status
commands.description: Show submission progress and audit trail

commands.title: NPHIES: Hydrate Limits
commands.description: Refresh approval limits from Oasis portal

mcpServers.name: Oracle Portal MCP
mcpServers.description: NPHIES portal automation and claim management tools

features: TypeScript strict-mode source files with full type coverage
React UI dashboard with BrainSAIT Glass Morphism & MeshGradient design
Bilingual (Arabic/English) support using IBM Plex Sans Arabic
ComplianceError and HealthcareAPIError typed error classes
FHIR R4 compliant type definitions for all clinical resources
Typed skill wrappers: claim-triage, doc-validation, approval-limits, batch-processor
HIPAA-compliant audit logging on every command execution
Dry-run enforcement (3 successful dry-runs required before live submission)
Initial release with 4 skills for claim workflows
6 new MCP tools for portal operations
6 slash commands for quick operator access
Complete audit logging and compliance support
